gherkin.given: An authenticated user, a non-empty query with live matches, and the source-locked enhancement loaded
gherkin.then: The browser emits exactly one real POST /search and Searching resolves to a positive result count and live links

existing server-rendered Search HTTP canary to extend

plannedTests.plannedTestId: Enter and pointer each issue exactly one real search request and render live results

scenarios.title: Pointer submission works without client enhancement

gherkin.given: An authenticated browser with JavaScript disabled or HTMX unavailable
gherkin.when: The user activates the semantic Search submit control for a non-empty query
gherkin.then: One native POST /search renders a complete terminal page with retained query and recovery actions

existing baseline Search endpoint canary to extend

plannedTests.plannedTestId: pointer search works with JavaScript disabled and blank input performs no search-domain work

gherkin.given: The embedded HTMX bytes differ from the lock-derived digest or the shared head weakens its source policy

scenarios.title: Blank query performs no search-domain work

gherkin.given: The query is empty, control-only, whitespace-only, or a mixture of whitespace and control characters
gherkin.when: The user submits through the native form or HTMX path
gherkin.then: SearchEngine and every downstream search-domain dependency execute zero times while the HTTP layer may return accessible validation without representing a search result

linkedTests.testId: existing Search handler validation canary to extend
existing Search endpoint canary to extend

plannedTests.plannedTestId: pointer search works with JavaScript disabled and blank input performs no search-domain work

scenarios.title: No match differs from request failure

gherkin.given: One authorized query completes with zero matches and another reaches a typed timeout or server failure
gherkin.then: No matches has no error language while each failure preserves the query and exposes its own Retry state

linkedTests.testId: existing Search result projection canary to extend
existing real empty-search canary to preserve

plannedTests.plannedTestId: baseline no-match failure and expired-session states remain mutually exclusive

gherkin.given: The browser session expires before the baseline form post
gherkin.then: The complete response presents route-only safe re-authentication and never claims no matches or includes the query in return metadata

plannedTests.plannedTestId: baseline no-match failure and expired-session states remain mutually exclusive

gherkin.then: Partial results names the unavailable capability and preserves operable verified rows, provenance, and the valid session

existing Search projection canary to extend

gherkin.given: An authenticated keyboard or screen-reader user at 320 CSS pixels, 200 percent zoom, and reduced motion
gherkin.when: The user submits and reviews every Search state
gherkin.then: State changes omit raw query text and controls, retries, filters, and result links remain ordered, operable, unclipped, and non-overlapping
